title: ornithosperma serotina
intro: Ornithosperma serotina, also known as the night-blooming grass or night-flowering grass, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Ornithosperma serotina can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
